query:
SELECT requirement_id, article_id, requirement_type, LEFT(legal_basis_text, 100) as legal_basis, LEFT(description, 80) as description, status
FROM regulatory_requirements
WHERE source_id = 'LC214-2025' AND status = 'active'
ORDER BY requirement_id
LIMIT 20;
